flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of California-Santa Cruz rose 23% between 2007 and 2010 ($11.0k → $13.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of California-Santa Cruz rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($43.8k → $50.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of California-Santa Cruz rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.1k → $16.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of California-Santa Cruz fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).
